title: Draw Steel Career
description: A career that defines a hero's background, starting benefits, and inciting incident.

flavor.description: Narrative description and guiding questions for the career.

skills.description: Skills granted by the career (e.g., ["Criminal Underworld", "Pick Lock", "Pick Pocket"]).

skill_group.description: Skill group constraint for skill choices (e.g., "intrigue", "exploration or intrigue").

language.description: Language granted by the career (e.g., "One language").

renown.description: Renown bonus granted by the career.

wealth.description: Starting wealth granted by the career.

project_points.description: Project points granted by the career (e.g., 120).

perk.description: Perk granted by the career (e.g., "Criminal Contacts").

perk_group.description: Perk group constraint for perk choice (e.g., "intrigue", "crafting").

inciting_incidents.description: d6 table of inciting incidents for the career.

content.description: Raw markdown body of the career description.

name.description: Short name of the incident (e.g., "Atonement", "Simply Survival").

description.description: Full narrative description of the inciting incident.
